SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class JavaService

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaService
public class JavaService extends Object
Facade for the JavaParser.

This class allows you to configure a classpath, and source path. To parse Java source files, to process them in the Java2Java pipeline and to have a proper symbol resolution.

    • readCompilationUnits

      public List<CompilationUnit> readCompilationUnits(Path parent, Collection<Path> files, FileRepo repo) throws IOException, BuildingExceptions
      read compilation units, given as a collection of Paths.
      Parameters:
      parent - directory ro relativize files
      files - the files to read
      repo - the repo to use for reading
      Returns:
      a list of KeY structured compilation units.
      Throws:
      IOException
      BuildingExceptions

    • readCompilationUnit

      public CompilationUnit readCompilationUnit(String text)
      read a compilation unit, given as a string.
      Parameters:
      text - a string represents a compilation unit
      Returns:
      a KeY structured compilation unit.

    • parseSpecialClasses

      public void parseSpecialClasses()
      makes sure that the special classes (library classes) have been parsed in.

      If not parsed yet, the special classes are read in and converted. This method throws only runtime exceptions for historical reasons.

    • parseSpecialClasses

      public void parseSpecialClasses(FileRepo fileRepo)
      makes sure that the special classes (library classes) have been parsed in.

      If not parsed yet, the special classes are read in and converted. This method throws only runtime exceptions for historical reasons.

      Parameters:
      fileRepo - the fileRepo which will store the files

    • transformModel

      protected void transformModel(List<com.github.javaparser.ast.CompilationUnit> cUnits)
      Transform a list of compilation units.

      Once a compilation unit has been parsed in and prior to converting it to the KeY structures, several transformations have to be performed upon it.

      You can add your own Transformation here. Make sure it is in the correct order.

      Parameters:
      cUnits - a list of compilation units, not null.

    • embedBlock

      protected com.github.javaparser.ast.body.MethodDeclaration embedBlock(com.github.javaparser.ast.stmt.BlockStmt block)
      wraps a RECODER StatementBlock in a method

      it is wrapped in a method called <virtual_method_for_parsing>.

      Parameters:
      block - the StatementBlock to wrap
      Returns:
      the enclosing MethodDeclaration

    • embedMethod

      protected com.github.javaparser.ast.body.ClassOrInterfaceDeclaration embedMethod(com.github.javaparser.ast.body.MethodDeclaration mdecl, JPContext context)
      wraps a RECODER MethodDeclaration in a class
      Parameters:
      mdecl - the declaration.MethodDeclaration to wrap
      context - the declaration.ClassDeclaration where the method has to be embedded
      Returns:
      the enclosing declaration.ClassDeclaration

    • createEmptyContext

      public JPContext createEmptyContext()
      creates an empty RECODER compilation unit with a temporary name.
      Returns:
      the new CompilationUnit

    • createContext

      protected JPContext createContext(Iterable<IProgramVariable> vars)
      create a new Context with a temporary name and make a list of variables visible from within.
      Parameters:
      vars - a list of variables
      Returns:
      a newly created context.

    • readBlock

      public JavaBlock readBlock(String block, JPContext context, Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
      parses a given JavaBlock using the context to determine the right references
      Parameters:
      block - a String describing a java block
      context - CompilationUnit in which the block has to be interprested
      allowSchemaJava - if parameter is non-null SchemaJava is allowed and the namespace is used to resolve symbols
      Returns:
      the parsed and resolved JavaBlock

    • readBlockWithEmptyContext

      public JavaBlock readBlockWithEmptyContext(String block, @Nullable Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
      parses a given JavaBlock using the context to determine the right references using an empty context
      Parameters:
      block - a String describing a java block
      allowSchemaJava - if parameter is non-null SchemaJava is allowed and the namespace is used to resolve symbols
      Returns:
      the parsed and resolved JavaBlock

    • readBlockWithProgramVariables

      public JavaBlock readBlockWithProgramVariables(Namespace<IProgramVariable> variables, String s, Namespace<SchemaVariable> allowSchemaJava)
      parses a given JavaBlock using a namespace to determine the right references using an empty context. The variables of the namespace are used to create a new class context
      Parameters:
      s - a String describing a java block
      allowSchemaJava - if parameter is non-null SchemaJava is allowed and the namespace is used to resolve symbols
      Returns:
      the parsed and resolved JavaBlock

    • readBlockWithProgramVariables

      public JavaBlock readBlockWithProgramVariables(String java)

    • getProgramFactory

      public JavaParserFactory getProgramFactory()
